pending.title: Can You Unlock Every GTA Online Plaque Before GTA VI? - 100% GTA Online Career Progress #17
pending.description:
A pure grind session across GTA Online career progress with no plaque to show for it at the end, just chipping away at a lot of different requirements. Unlocking the last Acid Lab names, killing 100 hostile versions of myself in Last Dose Checking In, completing the First Dose and Last Dose missions without dying, sourcing supplies one painful delivery at a time, doing KnoWay Out elite challenges, delivering cars for KDJ and Sessanta, Agatha Baker casino work, ten community series deathmatches that may or may not count, and selling product from every motorcycle club business. The Acid Lab source missions give one supply at a time when you need fifty. The deathmatches didn't register for community progress. Several sell missions refused to count.
